title: Jehovah Is a Great God

segments.text: Come, come, let’s sing for joy to Jehovah;
Come, come, let’s sing for joy to Jehovah;
Let’s make a joyful noise to the rock of our salvation.
Let’s come before His presence with thanksgiving;
Let’s make a joyful noise to Him with psalms.
For Jehovah is a great God, a great God, a great God.
Come, come, let’s sing for joy to Jehovah;
Come, come, let’s sing for joy to Jehovah;
Let’s make a joyful noise to the rock of our salvation.
Let’s come before His presence with thanksgiving;
Let’s make a joyful noise to Him with psalms.
For Jehovah is a great God, a great God, a great God
And a great King above all gods,
And a great King above all gods, all gods.
